name: Ambroxol
summary: Small-molecule lysosomal-restoration intervention tracked through Parkinson disease studies that test glucocerebrosidase target engagement and clinical progression endpoints.
mechanism_summary: Acts as a pharmacologic chaperone candidate for glucocerebrosidase biology, with human studies using Parkinson disease and Parkinson disease dementia as disease-specific lysosomal target-engagement contexts.

open_questions: Whether glucocerebrosidase target engagement translates into durable functional benefit
Whether Parkinson disease data generalize to broader lysosomal aging biology
Whether ASPro-PD or later trials report clinically meaningful outcomes
